chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. B.A. No. S- 1074 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 4.7.2014 1. For orders on MA 5236/14 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA 5237/14 Mr. Abdul Hakeem Chandio advocate for applicant Mr. Shahid Shaikh, A.P.G. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Through this application the applicant / surety Nasser Ahmed Chandio has prayed for return of surety documents who stood surety for accused Dr. Deedar Ali Malkani who was booked in Crime No. 201 of 2012 PS Jamshoro under Section 324, 353, 147, 148 and 149 PPC who was granted protective bail for a period of 07 days in terms of order dated 6.11.2013 in present bail application on the ground that accused has been acquitted by the trial court viz. Assistant Sessions Judge, Kotri vide its judgment dated 9.12.2013. Learned APG present in court has verified the record and recorded no objection in case application is allowed. The application stands allowed. The office is directed to return the surety papers to the applicant after due identification and verification. JUDGE k/-
